title: Rich Silky Norwegian Guanciale Pasta
description: A light and winey Norwegian dish featuring guanciale and lamination-puff, low in fat and perfect for a dinner meal
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to the package instructions
In a large skillet, cook the guanciale over medium heat until crispy
Remove the guanciale from the skillet and set aside
Add the butter to the skillet and melt
Add the white wine and chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes
Stir in the parmesan cheese until melted and smooth
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the sauce
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Serve the pasta hot, topped with crispy guanciale and chopped parsley
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
